_comment: OUR OWN real SP1 Groth16 proof of the R_pay genesis-branch guest (research/m4b-groth16/program). Unlike sp1-canonical-groth16.json (SP1's Fibonacci sample, used only to prove the on-chain primitive), THIS proof is bound to OUR statement: its two gnark public inputs are programVKey below (public_input[0]) and sha256(publicValues)&((1<<253)-1) (public_input[1]). Generated end to end: Mac ran STARK core->compress->shrink->wrap (research/m4b-real-groth16.md); the resulting gnark witness was proved on the RTX 3080 (WSL 'sp1', /root/circuit = canonical SP1 v6.1.0 trusted-setup artifacts groth16_pk/vk/circuit.bin), producing /mnt/d/wsl/output-test.bin (bincode Groth16Bn254Proof, 1670 bytes, sha256 b20440d7eb43e43fd5995c0f72e47c54998ec49009e0f4effeedc24bd6b3941c). proof below = 4-byte v6.1.0 verifier selector (0x4388a21c == VERIFIER_HASH()[0:4]) ++ encoded_proof (abi.encode(exitCode=0, vkRoot, nonce=0, uint256[8])). Verifies on-chain against the vendored SP1VerifierGroth16 v6.1.0 (its Groth16Verifier.sol embeds the same VK as /root/circuit/groth16_vk.bin, byte-for-byte modulo the pragma caret). See test/SP1PayVerifier.t.sol :: SP1PayVerifierOurRealGroth16Test.
publicValuesSchema: abi.encode(uint256 delta, bytes32 N_i, bytes32 C_i, bytes32 root)
